name: Rep. Gwen Moore
tweet: @dendria For those with access to bank loans, we want to ensure absolute certainty around the agreed upon terms, including the interest rate. We don’t want banks to sell that loan to a 3rd party where terms/rates change. That’s why we need uniformity. And that’s what this bill guarantees.

name: Rep. Gwen Moore
tweet: @dendria We don’t want them to turn to payday lenders where they’ll have to agree to interest rates they can't possibly afford. We don't them thrown into a cycle of poverty that's impossible to escape. We want to make sure low-income people have a sensible place to turn for a fair loan.

name: Rep. Gwen Moore
tweet: @dendria That’s where a bank loan becomes a lifesaver. That is, of course, if you have access to such loans.   But if we allow unsafe and unsound practices and products to harm the banking industry, our constituents will have fewer places to turn when they desperately need that money.
